educationalNotes.summary: Retinal layer receiving raw RGB pixel matrices.
educationalNotes.detailed: Accepts normalized three-channel RGB images of size 224x224. This spatial standardization ensures weight compatibility in subsequent layers.
educationalNotes.whyItMatters: Establishes spatial dimensions for the network.
educationalNotes.keyTakeaway: Fixed input sizes are critical to prevent spatial alignment errors.

educationalNotes.summary: Performs dynamic rescaling and normalization of input pixels.
educationalNotes.detailed: Scales and normalizes input image pixel ranges to match train bounds.
educationalNotes.whyItMatters: Prevents gradient saturation on early convolutions.

educationalNotes.summary: Zero padding for the stem conv.
educationalNotes.detailed: Pads borders to control dimensions.
educationalNotes.whyItMatters: Ensures boundary pixel convolving.

calculationSteps.label: Kernel Weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Stem convolution maps input channels to scaled filters.

educationalNotes.detailed: Captures baseline visual primitives and shrinks resolution by 50%.

educationalNotes.detailed: Swish: x * sigmoid(x). Smooth, non-monotonic curve that outperforms ReLU on deep models.
